title: Section 12
content: 12. Display of notice containing abstract of 1[sections 3A and 14].--Every railway administration, every port authority and every occupier shall cause to be displayed in a conspicuous and accessible place at every station on its railway or within the limits of a port or at the place of work, as the case may be, a notice in the local language and in the English language containing an abstract of 1[sections 3A and 14].
footnote: 1. Subs. by s. 16, ibid., for "section 3 and 14" (w.e.f. 1-9-2016).
